predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascending_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: is_common_property
predicates.description: The asset is part of the common property of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_exclusively_undivided_co_ownership_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is exclusively held in undivided co-ownership between the spouses of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own property of the deceased (not common property).

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24 or article 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_of_donation_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The deed of donation provides otherwise, excluding the surviving spouse's usufruct over the asset subject to legal reversion.

predicates.name: will_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The will provides otherwise, excluding the surviving spouse's usufruct over the asset subject to legal reversion.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_qualifying_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: usufruct_of_legal_reversion_asset_excluded
predicates.description: The usufruct over the asset subject to legal reversion is excluded by the deed of donation or the will.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the deceased's share in the asset (common property or exclusively undivided co-ownership between spouses).

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the asset belonging to the deceased's own property.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_legal_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the asset subject to the right of legal reversion, unless excluded by the deed of donation or will.
